title: Executive Order 7801—Establishing Black Coulee Migratory Waterfowl Refuge, Montana

flags.justification: A narrow, technical land designation for wildlife conservation under specific statutory authority.
A clear, specific designation subject to valid existing rights.
A land-designation action, not a compliance regime against private parties.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A permanent wildlife refuge designation, not a temporary-authority grant requiring review.
This establishes a new refuge without overriding any existing designated use; no oversight is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A narrow, routine application of an established conservation-designation mechanism.
No second agency or mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
